creator: pavelivolkov@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Neel Chauhan from comment #4)
Hello Neel.
I'm sorry, but this commit (https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=c3f5352877c3ce916e66e8ee63beab7d1ba61ebe) lost new file from my patch.
Please, find and added file "+++ databases/sqlite3/pkg-descr-tea" from patch.
Thank you.
